unit: plan (multi-plan phase; entries below are PLANS, not tasks within one plan)

completed_tasks.name: PILOT: harness overhaul (62/per-leaf/smell-leaf + check-crossrefs) + 11 Ch.6 basic leaves + README scaffold + calibration SUMMARY (62 name->slug map + rubric anchors)
principles.md (Ch.2)
completed_tasks.progress: principles.md authored + oracle-converged pre-session; BUT check-principles is 7/8 RED (missing the literal token 'definition'); needs a 1-token own-framing fix + a 07-03-SUMMARY before the phase gate

remaining_tasks.name: Ch.8 moving features (9 leaves): move-function, move-field, move-statements-into-function, move-statements-to-callers, replace-inline-code-with-function-call, slide-statements, split-loop, replace-loop-with-pipeline, remove-dead-code
Ch.11 refactoring APIs (11 leaves, incl. Return Modified Value [web-only])
Wave 4: 24 smell leaves + navigation smells.md + finalize README (Ch.7-12 rows) + FULL checker battery GREEN = phase gate

blockers.workaround: add the word 'definition' as own-framing (e.g. label the 'What refactoring is' section as the definition); own-words, no oracle re-review needed; fix before the 07-10 full-battery gate; then write 07-03-SUMMARY

human_actions_pending.action: If a future leaf's oracle-reviewer returns error because the source lacks that entry, flag to owner to add its Markdown to .oracle/
human_actions_pending.context: owner provisions .oracle/ chapters; already added Return Modified Value to Ch.11

decisions.decision: Orchestrator drives content plans INLINE (NOT via gsd-executor subagents)
decisions.rationale: the clean-room loop needs the Agent tool (to spawn oracle/oracle-reviewer) and AskUserQuestion (owner escalation); gsd-executor has neither, so the standard spawn-executor-in-worktree execute-phase flow CANNOT run this phase

decisions.decision: Chapter-by-chapter cadence with a PAUSE after each chapter for owner review
decisions.rationale: owner preference chosen at the pilot checkpoint
owner adjudication 2026-07-05: normal in-book Ch.6 refactoring; harness WEB_EXAMPLE now empty; Return Modified Value [web-only] is the sole provenance marker

decisions.decision: Return Modified Value stays Ch.11 (07-08), [web-only]; now gate-able (owner added it to .oracle/ Ch.11)
decisions.rationale: web edition places it in Ch.11 Refactoring APIs

decisions.decision: Refactorings cut between the 1st and 2nd editions stay cut (the 4 relics out of the 62)

next_action: Resume /gsd-execute-phase 7. Working tree clean. Next plan is 07-05 (Ch.8 moving features, 9 leaves). Drive it INLINE via the calibrated clean-room loop: read 07-05-PLAN.md; author 9 leaves blind (canonical slugs from the 07-02-SUMMARY name->slug map) -> gate via 2 parallel oracle-reviewer batches (SOURCE = Ch.8 moving features, CONTENT_TYPE refactoring-leaf, canonical per-axis anchors) -> revise blind -> converge -> extract-samples + check-hygiene green -> commit the 9 leaves + write 07-05-SUMMARY -> update ROADMAP/STATE -> PAUSE for owner review before Ch.9.
context_notes: Wave 2 pilot + Wave 3 Ch.7 done; catalog 20/62; loop fully calibrated (per-leaf gate, 2 parallel batches ~5+4, validate the deterministic layer BEFORE gating). FIREWALL (blocking): main context NEVER reads .oracle/ (ls for names only); only the oracle/oracle-reviewer subagents read it. Wave-3 chapter plans are FILE-DISJOINT: author ONLY the chapter's leaf files -- do NOT touch README.md or checker .mjs (07-10 fills README Ch.7-12 rows; check-catalog mirror + check-crossrefs are RED-by-design until 07-10 and are NOT wave-3 gates). Use distinct example domains/identifiers (never the source's) to avoid too_close_to_source. Ch.9/10/11 sources contain dagger-marked (print-absent) out-of-scope entries -- pass a tight per-leaf SCOPE so they are not flagged as drops. Owner escalation path when oracle-reviewer returns blocked: AskUserQuestion, or (per owner) consult the isolated `oracle` agent for the variation's own-words gist then represent it.
